auth.verifyEmailDesc: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Please verify your email to activate your account.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.welcomeBackDesc: Access international climate finance opportunities for your Mauritanian business.
auth.joinRichatDesc: Start discovering and applying for international climate finance opportunities for your business.
auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Register your business to get started
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetLinkSent: A password reset link has been sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox.
auth.setNewPasswordDesc: Choose a strong password for your account.
auth.weSentLinkTo: We've sent a verification link to
auth.step2: Find the email from Richat Funding Tracker
auth.step3: Click "Verify my email" to activate your account
auth.linkExpiry: The verification link expires in 24 hours. If you used the wrong email address,
auth.enterEmailBelow: Enter your email below to receive a new one. You can also go back to the
auth.signUpAgainSameEmail: and sign up again with the same email.
auth.linkSentIfExists: If an unverified account exists for that email, a new link has been sent. Check your inbox.
auth.stillReceiveEssential: You'll still receive essential account emails (e.g. password resets). You can re-enable notifications from your profile settings.

dashboard.overview: Here's an overview of your funding journey.

opportunities.title: Funding Opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: Browse and apply for climate funding in Mauritania
opportunities.hasDeadlineOnly: Only show opportunities with a deadline
opportunities.noOpportunitiesFiltered: No opportunities found matching your filters.

applications.title: My Applications
applications.subtitle: Track and manage your funding applications
applications.readyDesc: You are about to apply for "{{title}}". The next steps will ask for your motivation letter and supporting documents (PDF, max 5 MB each, 20 MB total).
applications.resuming: Resuming your previous application. Your progress has been saved.
applications.motivationDesc: Explain why your organization is a good fit for this funding. Your progress is saved automatically.
applications.uploadDesc: Attach supporting PDF documents — max 5 MB per file, 20 MB total.
applications.dropFiles: Drag & drop PDFs or click to browse
applications.withdrawConfirm: Are you sure you want to withdraw this application?
applications.conversationDesc: Message the review team about your application
applications.noMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation below.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Stay updated on your applications and opportunities
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: We'll notify you when something important happens.
notifications.chooseWhat: Choose what you want to be notified about, and how.
notifications.masterSwitch: Master switch — turn off to stop all notification emails.
notifications.appStatusChangesDesc: When an application you submitted is reviewed, approved, or rejected.
notifications.newOpportunitiesDesc: When a new opportunity matching your interests is published.
notifications.consultingResponsesDesc: When the Richat team responds to a consulting request you submitted.
notifications.deadlineRemindersDesc: Reminders 7 days and 1 day before an application deadline.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.subtitle: Get expert advice from Richat Partners
consulting.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you need help with…
consulting.startConversation: No messages yet. Start the conversation.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Your conversation with the Richat team
messages.emptyStateCta: Submit an application or a consulting request to start a conversation with the Richat team.

admin.adminProfileDesc: Manage your account information and password

opportunitiesPage.title: Opportunities Management
opportunitiesPage.subtitle: Create, edit, and publish funding opportunities
opportunitiesPage.publishConfirmMessage: "{{title}}" will become visible to all clients immediately, and its amount/deadline will be locked from further edits to maintain transparency for applicants.

usersPage.title: Users Management
usersPage.subtitle: Only verified accounts are shown here.
usersPage.enableConfirmDesc: This will allow {{email}} to log in again. Enter your admin password to confirm.
usersPage.disableConfirmDesc: This will prevent {{email}} from logging in. Enter your admin password to confirm.
usersPage.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete {{email}} and all their data. This action cannot be undone. Enter your admin password to confirm.

auditLogsPage.subtitle: Complete record of all system changes — who did what and when

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load. Please try again.
errors.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.boundaryDesc: The application hit an unexpected error while rendering this page. The technical detail below (also logged to the browser console) can help diagnose the problem.

hero.subtitle: Richat Funding Tracker automatically discovers international climate funding opportunities from GEF, GCF, World Bank, OECD and helps you apply and track your progress in one place.

home.sourcesLabel: Automatically monitoring these international funding sources

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From discovery to approval, we handle the complexity so you can focus on your project.

discovery.title: Automated Discovery
discovery.desc: Our scrapers continuously monitor 4 international funding databases and surface only opportunities relevant to Mauritania with confirmed amounts and deadlines.

applications.title: Simple Applications
applications.desc: Apply with a structured motivation letter and supporting documents. Track every status update in real time, with direct messaging to our review team.

support.title: Expert Support
support.desc: Richat Partners consultants review applications and provide guidance through our built-in consulting channel.

whatWeTrack.title: What We Track
whatWeTrack.subtitle: We focus exclusively on funding compatible with ethical finance principles: grants, concessional financing, and blended finance.

grants.title: Grants
grants.desc: Non-repayable funds from international climate institutions for qualifying projects.

concessional.title: Concessional Finance
concessional.desc: Below-market-rate financing with favorable terms for sustainable development.

blended.title: Blended Finance
blended.desc: Combinations of public grants and private capital structured to maximize impact.

multiSource.title: Multi-Source Monitoring
multiSource.desc: GEF, GCF, World Bank, OECD - all in one dashboard. No more manually checking different websites.

consulting.title: Expert Consulting
consulting.desc: Richat Partners provides hands-on guidance to strengthen your applications and improve your chances of approval.

notifications.title: Real-time Notifications
notifications.desc: Instant alerts when your application status changes, new matching opportunities appear, or deadlines approach.

cta.title: Ready to find your funding?
cta.subtitle: Join Mauritanian businesses using Richat Funding Tracker to discover and apply for international climate finance.

home.footer: © {{year}} Richat Partners, Nouakchott, Mauritania. All rights reserved.
